titles.text: Jungle no Ouja Tar-chan: Sekai Manyu Dai Kakutou no Maki
ジャングルの王者ターちゃん 世界漫遊大格闘の巻

descriptions.text: Ta-chan is the king of jungle. He was abandoned in savanna, and has been raised by a chimpanzee, Etekichi. He has a dearest wife, Jane who used to be a top model in New York, but now she looks…Anyway, to protect animals from poachers, Ta-chan is fighting against them with his disciple, Pedro, and a master of Chinese martial arts, Ryo.
